translations.A EFS soma pontuações (0 a 2) em 9 domín: The EFS sums scores (0 to 2) in 9 domains: cognition, general health status, functional independence, social support, medication use, nutrition, mood, continence, and functional performance (Timed Up and Go), totaling 0 to 17 points.
translations.0-5 = Sem fragilidade | 6-7 = Vulnerável: 0-5 = No frailty | 6-7 = Vulnerable | 8-9 = Mild frailty | 10-11 = Moderate | 12-17 = Severe.
translations.Escala de Fugulin - Classificação de Pac: Fugulin Scale - Patient Classification and Nursing Staff Sizing
translations.Calcule o Sistema de Classificação de Pa: Calculate the Fugulin Patient Classification System for nursing staff sizing, classifying the patient according to the degree of care dependency.
translations.Classificar o paciente conforme seu grau: Classify the patient according to their degree of dependency on nursing care, supporting nursing staff sizing in care units.
translations.Indicada para uso diário nas unidades de: Indicated for daily use in inpatient units as a management tool for nursing staff sizing, as recommended by COFEN.
translations.Pacientes internados em unidades de enfe: Patients admitted to hospital nursing units of any specialty.
translations.Estado Mental e Nível de Consciência: Mental State and Level of Consciousness
translations.Avalie o nível de consciência e orientaç: Assess the patient's level of consciousness and orientation.
translations.Períodos ocasionais de desorientação ou: Occasional periods of disorientation or confusion.
translations.Rebaixamento parcial do nível de consciê: Partial decrease in level of consciousness.
translations.Necessidade de suporte de oxigênio ou ve: Need for oxygen or ventilatory support.
translations.Respira em ar ambiente, sem necessidade: Breathing room air, no need for supplementation.
translations.Uso intermitente de oxigênio suplementar: Intermittent use of low-flow supplemental oxygen.
translations.Uso contínuo de oxigenoterapia com másca: Continuous oxygen therapy with mask or high flow.
translations.Paciente sob ventilação mecânica invasiv: Patient on continuous invasive or non-invasive mechanical ventilation.
translations.Frequência de monitorização e estabilida: Frequency of monitoring and stability of vital signs.
translations.Sinais vitais estáveis, controle conform: Stable vital signs, monitoring according to unit routine.
translations.Necessita de controle de sinais vitais a: Requires vital sign monitoring every 4-6 hours.
Requires vital sign monitoring every 2 hours.
translations.Movimenta-se no leito sem qualquer restr: Moves in bed without any restriction.
translations.Alguma limitação de movimento, necessita: Some limitation of movement, requires occasional assistance.
translations.Limitação importante de movimento, neces: Significant limitation of movement, requires frequent assistance.
translations.Totalmente incapaz de se movimentar no l: Totally unable to move in bed without full assistance.
translations.Capacidade de caminhar de forma independ: Ability to walk independently or with assistance.
translations.Necessita de auxílio de dispositivo ou d: Requires assistance of a device or a person to walk.
translations.Restrito ao leito, porém pode ser mobili: Confined to bed, but can be mobilized to chair/armchair.
translations.Totalmente restrito ao leito, sem indica: Totally confined to bed, with no indication or possibility of mobilization.
translations.Via e grau de independência para se alim: Route and degree of independence for feeding.
translations.Necessita de auxílio parcial para se ali: Requires partial assistance to feed orally.
translations.Necessita de assistência total, ou alime: Requires total assistance, or feeding via enteral tube.
translations.Recebe nutrição exclusivamente por via p: Receives nutrition exclusively via parenteral route.
translations.Grau de independência para higiene e cui: Degree of independence for hygiene and body care.
translations.Necessita de auxílio parcial para higien: Requires partial assistance for body hygiene.
translations.Necessita de banho no leito com auxílio: Requires bed bath with total assistance from the team.
translations.Necessita de cuidados corporais especiai: Requires special and continuous body care (e.g., multiple wounds, multiple devices).
translations.Grau de independência e tipo de controle: Degree of independence and type of elimination control.
translations.Controle esfincteriano preservado, uso i: Preserved sphincter control, independent use of bathroom.
translations.Incontinência com uso de dispositivo (so: Incontinence with use of device (urinary catheter, collector).
translations.Necessita de cuidados especiais e contín: Needs special and continuous care with eliminations (e.g., multiple stomas, dialysis).
translations.Complexidade do tratamento medicamentoso: Complexity of medication treatment and prescribed procedures.
translations.Infusão contínua de medicações ou múltip: Continuous infusion of medications or multiple intravenous drugs.
translations.Uso de drogas vasoativas, quimioterapia: Use of vasoactive drugs, chemotherapy, or high complexity/risk therapy.
translations.Paciente estável clinicamente e no autoc: Clinically stable patient in self-care, requiring minimal nursing care.
translations.• Cuidados de rotina conforme protocolo:
• Routine care per unit protocol
• Daily reassessment per institutional scale
translations.Paciente estável, porém com dependência: Stable patient, but with partial dependence on nursing care in one or more assessed areas.
translations.• Dimensionar equipe conforme parâmetros:
• Staff sizing per institutional parameters for intermediate care
• Daily reassessment
translations.Paciente com recuperação de cirurgias de: Patient recovering from major surgery or with instability of vital functions, but without imminent risk of death, with high dependence on the nursing team.
translations.• Dimensionar equipe conforme parâmetros:
• Staff sizing per institutional parameters for high dependency
• Daily or more frequent reassessment per evolution
translations.Paciente potencialmente grave, com neces: Potentially severe patient, requiring frequent nursing and medical assistance, with stable vital functions.
translations.• Dimensionar equipe conforme parâmetros:
• Staff sizing per institutional parameters for semi-intensive care
• Frequent monitoring and reassessment
translations.Paciente grave, com risco iminente de mo: Severe patient, with imminent risk of death, subject to instability of vital functions, requiring permanent and specialized nursing and medical assistance.
translations.• Dimensionar equipe conforme parâmetros:
• Staff sizing per institutional parameters for intensive care
• Continuous monitoring and reassessment every shift
translations.Risco de deterioração dos sistemas corpo: Risk of deterioration of body systems due to prescribed or unavoidable musculoskeletal inactivity, applicable according to the identified degree of dependence.
translations.Recursos de enfermagem compatíveis com a: Nursing resources compatible with patient needs
translations.Classificar diariamente o paciente confo: Classify the patient daily according to the degree of dependence
translations.Subsidiar o dimensionamento de pessoal d: Subsidize nursing staff sizing for the shift/unit
translations.Comunicar mudanças relevantes na classif: Communicate relevant changes in classification to the management team
translations.Documentar a classificação no prontuário: Document the classification in the medical record/institutional system
translations.O Sistema de Classificação de Pacientes: The Fugulin Patient Classification System, developed by Fugulin and collaborators based on studies by Perroca, evaluates 9 care areas (mental status, oxygenation, vital signs, motility, ambulation, feeding, body care, elimination, and therapeutics), each scored from 1 to 4, to classify the patient's degree of dependence on nursing care.
translations.Amplamente utilizado no Brasil como inst: Widely used in Brazil as a management tool to support nursing staff sizing, referenced by COFEN Resolution No. 543/2017, which addresses parameters for nursing staff sizing.
translations.Validado e amplamente utilizado em insti: Validated and widely used in Brazilian healthcare institutions as a standardized patient classification tool, supporting nursing human resource management decisions.
translations.A classificação deve ser reavaliada diar: Classification should be reassessed daily, as the patient's dependency level may change rapidly according to clinical evolution. Staff sizing parameters associated with each category vary according to current legislation and institutional norms.
translations.Reavalie a classificação diariamente, po: Reassess classification daily, as the patient's clinical condition may change rapidly.
translations.Utilize a classificação para subsidiar,: Use classification to support, not replace, the nurse's judgment regarding resource needs.
translations.Documente a classificação de forma consi: Document classification consistently to allow time-series analysis of the unit.
translations.Consulte a Resolução COFEN 543/2017 para: Consult COFEN Resolution 543/2017 for the sizing parameters associated with each category.
translations.Quantas áreas de cuidado compõem o Siste: How many care areas make up the Fugulin Classification System?
translations.O instrumento avalia 9 áreas: estado men: The instrument assesses 9 areas: mental status, oxygenation, vital signs, motility, ambulation, feeding, body care, elimination, and therapeutics.
translations.Para que finalidade principal é utilizad: What is the main purpose of the Fugulin Classification System?
translations.É um instrumento de gestão que subsidia: It is a management tool that supports nursing staff sizing, according to COFEN Resolution No. 543/2017.
translations.Um escore de 34 pontos classifica o paci: A score of 34 points classifies the patient into which category?
translations.Escores de 32 a 36 pontos classificam o: Scores from 32 to 36 points classify the patient as Intensive Care (PCIt), the highest dependency category.
translations.Com que frequência a classificação de Fu: How often should the Fugulin classification be reapplied?
translations.Recomenda-se reavaliação diária, geralme: Daily reassessment is recommended, usually once per shift or per day, according to institutional protocol, as the patient's dependency level may change rapidly.
translations.O Sistema de Fugulin substitui o julgame: Does the Fugulin System replace the nurse's clinical judgment?
translations.Não. É uma ferramenta objetiva de apoio: No. It is an objective management support tool, but the responsible nurse should always consider the patient's complete clinical context when making decisions about care and resource allocation.
translations.Como funciona o Sistema de Classificação: How the Fugulin Classification System works
translations.<p>O Sistema de Fugulin soma pontos de 9:
The Fugulin System sums points from 9 care areas — mental status, oxygenation, vital signs, motility, ambulation, feeding, body care, elimination, and therapeutics — each scored from 1 to 4, totaling 9 to 36 points, which classify the patient into 5 nursing care dependency categories.

Quick guide: 9-14 = Minimal | 15-20 = Intermediate | 21-26 = High Dependency | 27-31 = Semi-Intensive | 32-36 = Intensive.
translations.Escala de Fugulin - Classificação de Pac: Fugulin Scale - Patient Classification and Nursing Staff Sizing | Nursing Calculators

Indicated for daily use in inpatient units as a management tool for nursing staff sizing, as recommended by COFEN.

translations.O Sistema de Fugulin soma pontos de 9 ár: The Fugulin System sums points from 9 care areas — mental status, oxygenation, vital signs, motility, ambulation, feeding, body care, elimination, and therapy — each scored from 1 to 4, totaling 9 to 36 points, which classify the patient into 5 categories of nursing care dependency.
translations.9-14 = Mínimos | 15-20 = Intermediários: 9-14 = Minimal | 15-20 = Intermediate | 21-26 = High Dependency | 27-31 = Semi-Intensive | 32-36 = Intensive.
translations.Aplique o GAD-7 (Generalized Anxiety Dis: Apply the GAD-7 (Generalized Anxiety Disorder 7-item) to screen for severity of anxiety symptoms. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Rastrear e quantificar a gravidade de si: Screen and quantify the severity of anxiety symptoms over the past two weeks, based on 7 items related to Generalized Anxiety Disorder.
translations.Indicada para triagem de sintomas ansios: Indicated for screening anxious symptoms in primary care, nursing consultations, and follow-up of mental health treatment.
translations.Adultos, em qualquer contexto assistenci: Adults, in any care setting, especially primary care.
translations.1. Sentir-se Nervoso(a), Ansioso(a) ou M: 1. Feeling Nervous, Anxious, or On Edge
translations.Nas últimas 2 semanas, com que frequênci: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by this problem?
translations.2. Não Ser Capaz de Impedir ou Controlar: 2. Not Being Able to Stop or Control Worrying
translations.3. Preocupar-se Muito com Diversas Coisa: 3. Worrying Too Much About Different Things
translations.5. Ficar Tão Agitado(a) que se Torna Dif: 5. Being So Restless That It's Hard to Sit Still
translations.7. Sentir Medo como se Algo Terrível Fos: 7. Feeling Afraid as if Something Awful Might Happen
translations.• Nenhuma intervenção específica geralme:
• No specific intervention usually needed
• Reassess if new symptoms arise
translations.• Observação clínica ativa\n• Orientar s:
• Active clinical observation
• Provide guidance on stress management techniques and sleep hygiene
• Reassess at next visit
translations.Sintomas moderados de ansiedade, com pos: Moderate anxiety symptoms, with possible indication for therapeutic intervention.
translations.• Encaminhar para avaliação com profissi:
• Refer for evaluation by a mental health professional
• Consider psychotherapy and/or pharmacological treatment per medical evaluation
• Periodically reassess symptom progression
translations.Sintomas graves de ansiedade, com impact: Severe anxiety symptoms, with likely significant functional impact.
translations.• Encaminhamento prioritário para avalia:
• Priority referral for mental health evaluation
• Consider pharmacological treatment combined with psychotherapy
• Assess functional impact and need for additional support
translations.Sensação vaga e incômoda de desconforto: Vague and uncomfortable feeling of discomfort or fear, accompanied by autonomic response; feeling of apprehension caused by anticipation of danger.
translations.Interrupções no tempo e na qualidade do: Time-limited interruptions in sleep quantity and quality due to external factors.
translations.Incapacidade de formar uma avaliação vál: Inability to form a valid appraisal of stressors, inadequate choices of practical responses, and/or inability to use available resources.
translations.Aplicar o GAD-7 de forma sistemática em: Apply the GAD-7 systematically in patients with suspected anxiety
translations.Encaminhar para avaliação em saúde menta: Refer for mental health evaluation according to identified severity
translations.Orientar técnicas de manejo do estresse: Provide guidance on stress management and relaxation techniques
translations.O GAD-7 foi desenvolvido por Spitzer, Kr: The GAD-7 was developed by Spitzer, Kroenke, Williams, and Löwe as a brief screening instrument for Generalized Anxiety Disorder, assessing 7 core anxiety symptoms over the past 2 weeks.
translations.Amplamente utilizado mundialmente na ate: Widely used worldwide in primary care and mental health services, also useful for screening other anxiety disorders beyond GAD, such as panic disorder and social anxiety, and is in the public domain for clinical, educational, and research use.
translations.Extensivamente validado em diversas popu: Extensively validated in diverse populations and languages, including Brazilian Portuguese, with good sensitivity and specificity for identifying Generalized Anxiety Disorder.
translations.É um instrumento de rastreio, não substi: It is a screening instrument, not a substitute for formal clinical diagnosis, which must be performed by a qualified professional. Anxiety symptoms may overlap with other clinical and psychiatric conditions, requiring careful differential evaluation.
translations.O GAD-7 também é útil para rastrear outr: The GAD-7 is also useful for screening other anxiety disorders besides GAD, such as panic disorder and social anxiety.
translations.Aplique em ambiente privado e acolhedor,: Apply in a private and welcoming environment, explaining the purpose of the questionnaire before starting.
translations.Reavalie periodicamente para acompanhar: Reassess periodically to monitor treatment response over time.
translations.O instrumento não substitui a avaliação: The instrument does not replace complete clinical and diagnostic evaluation by a qualified mental health professional.
translations.Quantos itens compõem o GAD-7?: How many items make up the GAD-7?
translations.O GAD-7 possui 7 itens relacionados aos: The GAD-7 has 7 items related to the core symptoms of Generalized Anxiety Disorder.
translations.Um escore de 16 pontos no GAD-7 é classi: A score of 16 on the GAD-7 is classified as which severity?
translations.Escores de 15 a 21 pontos são classifica: Scores from 15 to 21 are classified as severe anxiety.
translations.O GAD-7 serve apenas para rastrear Trans: Is the GAD-7 only used to screen for Generalized Anxiety Disorder?
translations.Não, também é útil para rastrear outros: No, it is also useful for screening other anxiety disorders
translations.Serve apenas para depressão: It is only used for depression
translations.Não tem utilidade clínica comprovada: It has no proven clinical utility
translations.Embora desenvolvido para o TAG, o GAD-7: Although developed for GAD, the GAD-7 also has good screening ability for other anxiety disorders, such as panic and social anxiety.
translations.O GAD-7 é um instrumento de diagnóstico: Is the GAD-7 a diagnostic instrument for anxiety?
translations.Não. É um instrumento de rastreio e acom: No. It is a screening and severity monitoring instrument for anxiety symptoms. Formal diagnosis must be performed by a qualified mental health professional based on a complete clinical evaluation.
translations.O GAD-7 pode ser usado junto com o PHQ-9: Can the GAD-7 be used together with the PHQ-9?
translations.Sim. É comum aplicar ambos os instrument: Yes. It is common to apply both instruments together in mental health screening, as anxiety and depression often coexist and overlap clinically.
translations.<p>O GAD-7 soma pontos de 7 itens relaci:
The GAD-7 sums points from 7 items related to core anxiety symptoms, each scored from 0 (not at all) to 3 (nearly every day), referring to the past 2 weeks, totaling 0 to 21 points.

Quick guide: 0-4 = Minimal | 5-9 = Mild | 10-14 = Moderate | 15-21 = Severe.

translations.Escala de Depressão Geriátrica (GDS-15): Geriatric Depression Scale (GDS-15) - Depression Screening in Older Adults
translations.Calcule a Escala de Depressão Geriátrica: Calculate the Geriatric Depression Scale (15-item short form) to screen for depressive symptoms in older adults. Includes interpretation, NANDA-I nursing diagnoses, and evidence.
translations.Rastrear sintomas depressivos em idosos: Screen for depressive symptoms in older adults through 15 simple yes/no questions, aiding early identification of geriatric depression.
translations.Indicada no rastreio de depressão em ido: Indicated for depression screening in older adults, especially in primary care, geriatrics, and long-term care facilities.
translations.Pacientes idosos (geralmente 60 anos ou: Older adult patients (usually 60 years or older) without severe cognitive impairment that prevents understanding the questions.
translations.1. Está satisfeito(a) com sua vida?: 1. Are you satisfied with your life?
translations.2. Abandonou muitos de seus interesses e: 2. Have you dropped many of your interests and activities?
translations.3. Sente que sua vida está vazia?: 3. Do you feel that your life is empty?
translations.5. Sente-se bem com a vida a maior parte: 5. Do you feel good about life most of the time?
translations.6. Tem medo que algo de ruim lhe aconteç: 6. Are you afraid that something bad will happen to you?
translations.7. Sente-se feliz a maior parte do tempo: 7. Do you feel happy most of the time?
translations.9. Prefere ficar em casa a sair e fazer: 9. Do you prefer to stay at home rather than go out and do new things?
translations.10. Sente que tem mais problemas de memó: 10. Do you feel you have more memory problems than most people?
translations.11. Pensa que é maravilhoso estar vivo(a: 11. Do you think it is wonderful to be alive now?
translations.12. Sente-se um tanto inútil, do jeito q: 12. Do you feel pretty worthless the way you are now?
translations.13. Sente-se cheio(a) de energia?: 13. Do you feel full of energy?
translations.14. Sente que sua situação é sem esperan: 14. Do you feel that your situation is hopeless?
translations.15. Acha que a maioria das pessoas está: 15. Do you think that most people are better off than you are?
translations.Pontuação de 0 a 4 pontos, geralmente co: Score 0-4 points, generally considered within normal range.
translations.• Manter acompanhamento de rotina\n• Rea:
• Maintain routine follow-up
• Reassess periodically, especially after stressful events
translations.Pontuação entre 5 e 8 pontos sugere sint: Score between 5 and 8 points suggests mild depressive symptoms.
translations.• Investigar fatores associados (isolame:
• Investigate associated factors (social isolation, bereavement, chronic diseases)
• Consider referral for specialized evaluation
• Reassess periodically
translations.Pontuação entre 9 e 11 pontos sugere sin: Score between 9 and 11 points suggests moderate depressive symptoms.
translations.• Encaminhar para avaliação especializad:
• Refer for specialized mental health evaluation
• Investigate risk of suicidal ideation
• Involve family in care plan
translations.Pontuação entre 12 e 15 pontos sugere si: Score between 12 and 15 points suggests severe depressive symptoms.
translations.• Encaminhamento prioritário para avalia:
• Priority referral for psychiatric/psychological evaluation
• Actively assess risk of suicidal ideation and behavior
• Involve multidisciplinary team and family in care plan
translations.Suscetibilidade a vivenciar um mal-estar: Susceptibility to experiencing discomfort associated with a desire or need for more contact with others, related to identified depressive symptoms.
translations.Interrupções, durante um período de temp: Time-limited interruptions of sleep quantity and quality due to external factors, common in depressive disorders.
translations.Risco de lesão autoinfligida que ameaça: Risk for life-threatening self-injury, to be actively investigated in patients with high GDS-15 scores.
translations.Escore da GDS-15 avaliado e monitorado a: GDS-15 score assessed and monitored over time
translations.Encaminhamento para avaliação especializ: Referral for specialized evaluation when indicated
translations.Aplicar a GDS-15 no rastreio de sintomas: Administer GDS-15 to screen for depressive symptoms in older adults
translations.Investigar ativamente risco de ideação s: Actively investigate risk of suicidal ideation in high scores
translations.Encaminhar para avaliação especializada: Refer for specialized mental health evaluation based on results
translations.Envolver a família no plano de cuidados: Involve family in care plan and observation
translations.Estimular participação em atividades soc: Encourage participation in social and physical activities as tolerated
translations.A Escala de Depressão Geriátrica (GDS) e: The Geriatric Depression Scale (GDS) in its short form (GDS-15) assesses depressive symptoms through 15 yes/no questions, with a score ranging from 0 to 15, where 10 items score when answered 'yes' and 5 items (1, 5, 7, 11, and 13) score when answered 'no'.
translations.Desenvolvida por Jerome Yesavage e colab: Developed by Jerome Yesavage and colleagues, the original version had 30 items; the 15-item short form was later created to facilitate administration in older adults, maintaining good validity and reliability.
translations.Amplamente validada para rastreio de dep: Widely validated for depression screening in older adults, with good sensitivity and specificity, being one of the most used screening tools in geriatrics and primary care.
translations.Não deve ser utilizada em idosos com com: Should not be used in older adults with significant cognitive impairment that prevents understanding of the questions. It is a screening tool, not a substitute for specialized mental health diagnostic evaluation.
translations.A GDS-15 possui 5 itens de resposta inve: The GDS-15 has 5 reverse-scored items (1, 5, 7, 11, and 13), where the answer 'No' scores for depression — extra attention needed when administering.
translations.É uma ferramenta de rastreio, não de dia: It is a screening tool, not diagnostic — elevated scores should be followed by specialized evaluation.
translations.Não é indicada para idosos com compromet: Not indicated for older adults with significant cognitive impairment, who may have difficulty understanding and answering questions reliably.
translations.Sempre investigue ativamente risco de id: Always actively investigate risk of suicidal ideation in older adults with elevated scores, regardless of answers to specific questions on the topic.
translations.Quantos itens da GDS-15 têm resposta inv: How many items of the GDS-15 have reverse scoring (score when answered 'No')?
translations.Cinco itens (1, 5, 7, 11 e 13) pontuam q: Five items (1, 5, 7, 11, and 13) score when answered 'No', unlike the other 10 items that score when answered 'Yes'.
translations.Qual pontuação total sugere sintomas dep: What total score suggests severe depressive symptoms?
translations.Uma pontuação entre 12 e 15 pontos suger: A score between 12 and 15 points suggests severe depressive symptoms on the GDS-15.
translations.A GDS-15 é apropriada para idosos com co: Is the GDS-15 appropriate for older adults with significant cognitive impairment?
translations.Não, pode comprometer a confiabilidade d: No, it may compromise the reliability of responses
translations.Apenas em fase inicial de demência leve: Only in early stage of mild dementia
translations.É a ferramenta preferencial nesses casos: It is the preferred tool in these cases
translations.A GDS-15 não é recomendada para idosos c: The GDS-15 is not recommended for older adults with significant cognitive impairment, as this may compromise understanding of the questions and reliability of responses.
translations.A GDS-15 substitui a avaliação psiquiátr: Does the GDS-15 replace psychiatric evaluation?
translations.Não. É uma ferramenta de rastreio que aj: No. It is a screening tool that helps identify older adults with possible depressive symptoms, but definitive diagnosis and treatment plan should be established by specialized mental health evaluation.
translations.A GDS-15 pode ser usada em idosos com de: Can the GDS-15 be used in older adults with dementia?
translations.Não é recomendada para idosos com compro: It is not recommended for older adults with significant cognitive impairment, as understanding of the questions may be impaired, compromising reliability of responses.
translations.Como funciona a Escala de Depressão Geri: How the Geriatric Depression Scale (GDS-15) works
translations.<p>A GDS-15 soma 1 ponto para cada respo:
The GDS-15 adds 1 point for each response indicative of depressive symptoms among 15 yes/no questions, totaling 0 to 15 points. Five items (1, 5, 7, 11, 13) have reverse scoring.

Quick guide: 0-4 = No significant symptoms | 5-8 = Mild | 9-11 = Moderate | 12-15 = Severe.

translations.A GDS-15 possui 5 itens de resposta inve: The GDS-15 has 5 reverse-scored items (1, 5, 7, 11, and 13), where the answer 'No' scores for depression — extra attention when applying.
translations.Rastrear sintomas depressivos em idosos: Screen for depressive symptoms in older adults through 15 simple yes/no questions, aiding in early identification of geriatric depression. Indicated for depression screening in older adults, especially in primary care, geriatrics, and long-term care facilities.

translations.Acompanhamento pré-natal preciso com bas: Accurate prenatal follow-up based on the Last Menstrual Period (LMP).
translations.Enfermeiro, incentive a gestante a reali: Nurse, encourage the pregnant woman to undergo prenatal care, essential for reducing maternal and infant mortality. It provides guidance on nutrition, care, family planning, vaccination, and promotes maternal empowerment. The estimated date of delivery (EDD) should be estimated based on ultrasound and the date of the last menstrual period, considering 40 weeks of gestation.
First day of the last menstrual cycle. Main basis for gestational calculation.
translations.Adicione 7 dias ao 1º dia da DUM. Ajuste: Add 7 days to the 1st day of LMP. Adjust the month:
translations.Conte os dias exatos desde a DUM até hoj: Count the exact days from LMP to today. Divide by 7. The integer is the week; the remainder is the days.

translations.Calcule o Escore de Glasgow-Blatchford p: Calculate the Glasgow-Blatchford Score to assess the need for hospital intervention in patients with upper gastrointestinal bleeding. Includes interpretation and evidence.
translations.Estimar a probabilidade de necessidade d: Estimate the probability of needing hospital intervention (transfusion, therapeutic endoscopy, or surgery) in patients with upper gastrointestinal bleeding, aiding in identifying low-risk patients eligible for outpatient management.
translations.Indicada para pacientes com suspeita ou: Indicated for patients with suspected or confirmed upper gastrointestinal bleeding (hematemesis, melena) in the emergency department.
translations.Pacientes adultos com sinais de hemorrag: Adult patients with signs of upper gastrointestinal bleeding.
translations.Episódio de síncope associado ao quadro: Episode of syncope associated with the current condition.
translations.Histórico de doença hepática (incluindo: History of hepatic disease (including known or suspected cirrhosis).
translations.Risco muito baixo de necessidade de inte: Very low risk of needing hospital intervention. Patients with a score of 0 may, in certain contexts, be considered for outpatient management with close follow-up.
translations.• Avaliar possibilidade de manejo ambula:
• Assess possibility of outpatient management per medical judgment and patient's social context
• Educate on warning signs for immediate return
translations.Presença de risco, sugerindo necessidade: Presence of risk, suggesting probable need for hospital intervention (endoscopy, transfusion, or other intervention).
translations.• Internação hospitalar para observação:
• Hospital admission for observation and endoscopic investigation
• Vital sign monitoring and fluid resuscitation per medical evaluation
• Notify gastroenterology team
translations.Alto risco de necessidade de intervenção: High risk of needing urgent hospital intervention and adverse outcomes.
translations.• Internação hospitalar com monitorizaçã:
• Hospital admission with intensive monitoring
• Urgent upper endoscopy per medical evaluation
• Fluid resuscitation and transfusion per protocol
• Consider evaluation for intensive care
translations.Risco de diminuição do volume de líquido: Risk of decreased intravascular, interstitial, and/or intracellular fluid volume related to active blood loss.
translations.Redução na circulação sanguínea para a p: Decrease in blood circulation to the periphery, which may compromise health.
translations.Risco de fluxo sanguíneo inadequado aos: Risk of inadequate blood flow to body tissues, which may lead to potentially fatal cellular dysfunction.
translations.Ausência de sinais de choque hipovolêmic: Absence of signs of hypovolemic shock
translations.Aplicar o Escore de Glasgow-Blatchford n: Apply the Glasgow-Blatchford Score on initial assessment
translations.Auxiliar na obtenção de acesso venoso ca: Assist in obtaining large-bore venous access and fluid resuscitation
translations.Coletar exames laboratoriais conforme so: Collect laboratory tests as ordered (hemoglobin, urea)
translations.Preparar o paciente para endoscopia dige: Prepare patient for upper endoscopy as indicated
translations.O Escore de Glasgow-Blatchford foi desen: The Glasgow-Blatchford Score was developed by Oliver Blatchford and colleagues, combining simple clinical and laboratory data (urea, hemoglobin, systolic blood pressure, heart rate, melena, syncope, hepatic disease, and heart failure) to predict the need for hospital intervention in patients with upper gastrointestinal bleeding, without requiring prior endoscopy.
translations.Amplamente utilizado em serviços de emer: Widely used in emergency departments to identify low-risk patients (score 0) who could be safely considered for outpatient management, optimizing hospital resources and reducing unnecessary admissions.
translations.Validado extensivamente na literatura, c: Extensively validated in the literature, with excellent sensitivity for identifying patients who will require intervention, considered by many guidelines to be superior to other scores (such as the pre-endoscopic Rockall) for this specific purpose.
translations.Não avalia diretamente a causa da hemorr: It does not directly assess the cause of bleeding, being complementary, not a substitute, for upper endoscopy for definitive diagnosis and treatment. The urea values used in this calculator consider approximate conversion from the original cutoffs in mmol/L.
translations.Um escore de Glasgow-Blatchford igual a: A Glasgow-Blatchford score of 0 identifies very low-risk patients who may be considered for outpatient management in appropriate clinical and social contexts.
translations.Diferente de outros escores, o Glasgow-B: Unlike other scores, the Glasgow-Blatchford does not require endoscopy results to be calculated, making it useful for initial triage.
translations.A hemoglobina tem pontos de corte difere: Hemoglobin has different cutoffs for men and women — pay attention when selecting the correct option.
translations.Reavalie continuamente os sinais vitais: Continuously reassess the patient's vital signs, as gastrointestinal bleeding can evolve rapidly.
translations.Qual a principal vantagem do Escore de G: What is the main advantage of the Glasgow-Blatchford Score over scores that require endoscopy?
translations.Pode ser calculado antes da endoscopia,: It can be calculated before endoscopy, at initial triage
translations.Não usa exames laboratoriais: It does not use laboratory tests
translations.O Glasgow-Blatchford usa apenas dados cl: The Glasgow-Blatchford uses only simple clinical and laboratory data and can be calculated immediately at triage, before endoscopy is performed.
translations.Um escore de Glasgow-Blatchford igual a: A Glasgow-Blatchford score of 0 suggests which management?
translations.Pode-se considerar manejo ambulatorial e: Outpatient management may be considered in an appropriate context
translations.Repetir hemograma em 1 semana: Repeat complete blood count in 1 week
translations.Escore 0 identifica pacientes de risco m: A score of 0 identifies very low-risk patients who, in certain clinical and social contexts, may be considered for outpatient management with follow-up.
translations.Os pontos de corte de hemoglobina no Gla: Are the hemoglobin cutoffs in the Glasgow-Blatchford the same for men and women?
translations.O escore possui pontos de corte de hemog: The score has differentiated hemoglobin cutoffs for men and women, reflecting the different reference values between sexes.
translations.O Glasgow-Blatchford substitui a endosco: Does the Glasgow-Blatchford replace upper endoscopy?
translations.Não. É uma ferramenta de triagem inicial: No. It is an initial risk triage tool calculated before endoscopy. Endoscopy remains essential for diagnosing the cause of bleeding and definitive treatment when indicated.
translations.Os valores de ureia desta calculadora es: In which unit are the urea values in this calculator?
translations.Os valores foram convertidos para mg/dL: The values have been converted to mg/dL (the unit most commonly used in Brazilian laboratories) from the original cutoffs in mmol/L published in the original study.
translations.Como funciona o Escore de Glasgow-Blatch: How does the Glasgow-Blatchford Score work?
translations.<p>O Escore de Glasgow-Blatchford soma p:
The Glasgow-Blatchford Score sums weighted points from 8 clinical and laboratory variables — urea, hemoglobin, systolic blood pressure, heart rate, melena, syncope, hepatic disease, and cardiac failure — totaling 0 to 23 points.

Quick guide: 0 = Very low risk (consider outpatient management) | 1-11 = Risk present | ≥12 = High risk, urgent hospital intervention.

Indicated for patients with suspected or confirmed upper GI bleeding (hematemesis, melena) in the emergency department.

translations.O Escore de Glasgow-Blatchford soma pont: The Glasgow-Blatchford Score sums weighted points from 8 clinical and laboratory variables — urea, hemoglobin, systolic blood pressure, heart rate, melena, syncope, hepatic disease, and cardiac failure — totaling 0 to 23 points.
translations.0 = Risco muito baixo (considerar manejo: 0 = Very low risk (consider outpatient management) | 1-11 = Risk present | ≥12 = High risk, urgent hospital intervention.
